body:
Priya, great connecting with you at the [Catalyst Climate Summit](events/catalyst-climate-summit) last week — I've been thinking about the conversation we had around grid-edge infrastructure and how thin the Series A market still feels for companies operating in that space. I wanted to follow up because we're actively looking at a few opportunities there and I'd love to compare notes, especially given Sequoia's recent positioning in energy transition. If you have 30 minutes sometime in the next two weeks, I think there's real value in a proper sit-down — even if nothing actionable comes of it immediately, I'd rather build the relationship now than scramble when a deal requires fast alignment. Let me know what works on your end.

Amara
